series_metadata.series_description: The Technology Articles - Internal includes papers, newsletters and other publications written by Infrastructure and Technology (IT) Division employees for the purpose of sharing ideas, strategies, vision and success stories about information technology topics with the rest of the IT Division. Topics include but are not limited to integration, service oriented architecture, business process management/modeling, and event driven architecture.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: when strategies, vision and technology are superseded, obsolete, or replaced
